title: アタシはアタシらしく

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
People are crowding in front of the central plaza.
I'm curious, so I go to check it out.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ahem. Ah... Hello, darling p-pony. Whaddya
wanna—I mean... Is there anything that might be
bothering you?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Uh, Hishiama?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
This darkening of your lovely eyes must mean...
Uh, you'd like me to stop...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: The hell are you doing?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Brian! Your... your hair is looking lovely
today! So lovely... that I want to take you on,
one-on-one!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Sigh. Come here a minute.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
So why the Fuji impersonation all of a sudden?
Thought you hated acting all dramatic.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Yeah, but this is... I have my reasons, all right?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
See, that student back there lives in my dorm. She
always seems worried about something.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: She opened up to Fuji, apparently, but as her dorm leader, I'm supposed to be the one she goes to!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Does she really not trust me? What kinda leader
am I if no one feels like they can talk to me?
Damn it!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Ama.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh right! What did ya think of my performance?
Did I seem more trustworthy 'cause I was acting
like Fuji?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You've lost it lately. The Ama I know wouldn't try
to be someone else.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: What!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
What happened to all that passion you show in
your races? No way you're giving anyone advice
like this.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
At least I wouldn't think to lean on someone
who's forgotten how to be herself.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That's harsh, but... you're right. I was trying silly
tricks when I shoulda faced my problem head-on.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
...Thanks for the wake-up call. It's time to solve
this properly!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, Hishi Amazon resolves her resident's
problem, and seems delighted when more
students start coming to her for help afterwards.
